description: Create an SLD style named 'city_labels_priority' for the 'ne_populated_places' layer in GeoServer (http://localhost:8080/geoserver/web/, user: admin, pass: Admin123!). The style must include a red circle point symbolizer of size 6 and a text symbolizer for the 'name' attribute using Arial Bold, 12px, Black font. Configure the text placement with Anchor X=0.5, Y=0.0, and a 5px vertical displacement. Use the 'pop_max' attribute for labeling priority and include a 'spaceAround' VendorOption set to 15. Assign 'city_labels_priority' as the default style for the 'ne:ne_populated_places' layer.
